_comment: Addendum to roadmap.json — 1 new group + 5 items for the Packaging (Phase 3) workstream. Generated 2026-06-01 by the packaging-plan-2026 task loop. NOT auto-loaded by the board UI; the loop hit roadmap.json's 67KB size in a single update_file call. To merge into roadmap.json: either (a) open /fairee-board/, click Settings → Import, paste the items below into the appropriate location of the existing roadmap.json structure, then Save→GitHub; or (b) hand-edit roadmap.json locally by inserting the `_new_group` into roadmap.json's `groups` array and the `_new_items` into the `items` array, then commit.
_instructions_for_merging: Step 1: Open fairee-board/assets/data/roadmap.json on this branch.
Step 3: Append the object in `_new_group` below to that array.
Step 4: Locate the `items` array (search for `"items": [` — should be the last top-level key).
Step 5: Append the 5 objects in `_new_items` below to that array.
Step 6: Update the top-level `updated` field to today's date.
Step 7: Validate JSON parses: `python -m json.tool < roadmap.json > /dev/null`.
Step 8: Commit + push (or use the board UI's Save→GitHub button).

_new_items.title: selfcens-densityratio — standalone PyPI package
_new_items.detail: Scaffolded 2026-06-01: pyproject.toml (v0.1.0, full PEP 621), README, LICENSE (Apache-2.0), _core.py (verbatim port of density_ratio_nsc.py), 10 smoke tests. Pure numpy+scipy; zero internal coupling. 90% PyPI-ready. Audience: causal-inference / MNAR / biostats — NOT fairness-specific. Next: actual pip upload (requires user PyPI credentials).

_new_items.title: fairness-run-audit — standalone PyPI package
_new_items.detail: Scaffolded 2026-06-01: pyproject.toml (zero runtime deps; pure stdlib `math`), README documenting 9-check input-dict schema, LICENSE (Apache-2.0), 18 smoke tests covering all 9 checks. Library-agnostic — works with any post-processing fair classifier. 85% PyPI-ready. Audience: fair-ML practitioners across libraries (fairlearn, aif360, in-house).

_new_items.title: fairee — root package refinement
_new_items.detail: 2026-06-01: pyproject.toml migrated from minimal to full PEP 621 — 8 runtime deps, 4 optional extras (baselines/exp/dev/all), 14 classifiers, 7 project URLs. ~75% PyPI-ready. Remaining: move legacy src/fairee/algo/fairee.py to fairee.legacy (only file with hard engine.* imports; not re-exported anyway). The 10-name public API in __init__.py is the clean v0.x surface.

_new_items.title: simforge — reusable simulation-experiment infrastructure
_new_items.detail: Scaffolded 2026-06-01 with v0.1.0.dev0 status. Public API declared via NotImplementedError stubs (Router, NDJSONStore, run_once, register_method, summarize). Canonical source still at src/engine/. Renamed from `statsup` (per original blueprint) to avoid SEO collision with the StatsUpAI community site. Refactor tasks ~2-3 weeks: registry pattern for runner's 16-branch dispatch, sys.path removal, fcntl gate for Windows, config_loggers decoupling, runner decoupling from fairee.*.

_new_items.title: fair-ml-bench — fair-ML benchmark suite
_new_items.detail: Scaffolded 2026-06-01 with v0.1.0.dev0 status. Public API stubs: compare() + run_sweep(). Depends on fairee + simforge + fairness-run-audit + selfcens-densityratio reaching v1.0 first. 12 benchmark scripts at exp/benchmarks/ + 32 result dirs + 4 datasets (Adult/COMPAS/German/synthetic) need to be refactored from PYTHONPATH-dependent scripts into importable modules. Longest runway of the 5 packages (~1+ month).
